    • Welcome to Oscar's Sports & Grill

    Voted #1 Bar in Saline for 2024 by the people!

    Discover unforgettable flavors and great times at Oscar's Sports & Grill! Proudly serving Saline, Ann Arbor, and the surrounding communities since 2006, we’re committed to offering fresh, high-quality food crafted in our scratch kitchen.

    With 10 beers on draft, 29 bottled varieties, canned favorites like White Claws, Long Drinks, Good Boy John Dalys, and beer buckets, plus handcrafted cocktails, there’s something for everyone.

    At Oscar’s, we’re more than a bar – we’re about family, community, and creating lasting memories. Thank you for your continued support, and we can’t wait to welcome you back soon!

    At Oscar's Sports & Grill you are sure to enjoy the great atmosphere, the Hi-Def televisions, outdoor patio, friendly service, and hassle FREE parking!

    Join us every Wednesday and Saturday night for Trivia at 7pm, and every Thursday night for fun action Bingo. Play for a chance to win great prizes!

    With Best Regards,
    The Oscar’s Sports & Grill Team


    Leave us a Review on Yelp or Google

    Review on Yelp Review on Google

    Menus

    We have a variety of choices from burgers made with fresh Knight's Meats beef and fresh baked Benny's Bakery Kaiser buns to Mexican entrees and other delicious platters. We have formulated our menu based on customer feedback over last 10 years and have even been the recipient's of being voted best food at taste of Saline.

    Draft List

    COMING SOON - Place an order online for pickup or local delivery!

    Catering

    Let us cater your next event! We offer catering options perfect for groups of all sizes.

    Private Events

    Our intimate dining areas and shareable menu make us the perfect setting for your next event.
